---
title: "Publications"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(jsonlite)
library(glue)

zotero_group_id <- "6458407"
api_url <- glue("https://api.zotero.org/groups/{zotero_group_id}/items?format=json&limit=100&sort=date&direction=desc")

items <- fromJSON(api_url, simplifyVector = FALSE)

pubs <- Filter(function(x) x$data$itemType %in% c("journalArticle", "book", "bookSection", "conferencePaper"), items)

format_authors <- function(creators) {
    authors <- Filter(function(c) c$creatorType == "author", creators)
    formatted <- vapply(authors, function(a) {
        if (!is.null(a$lastName) && !is.null(a$firstName)) {
            paste0(a$lastName, ", ", substr(a$firstName, 1, 1), ".")
        } else if (!is.null(a$name)) {
            a$name
        } else {
            ""
        }
    }, character(1))
    paste(formatted, collapse = ", ")
}

format_pub <- function(item) {
    d <- item$data
    authors <- format_authors(d$creators)
    title <- d$title
    year <- if (!is.null(d$date) && nchar(d$date) >= 4) substr(d$date, 1, 4) else ""
    journal <- if (!is.null(d$publicationTitle)) gsub("&amp;", "&", d$publicationTitle) else ""
    doi <- d$DOI
    vol <- d$volume
    issue <- d$issue
    pages <- d$pages
    publisher <- d$publisher

    # Title with DOI link if available
    if (!is.null(doi) && nchar(doi) > 0) {
        title_html <- glue('<a href="https://doi.org/{doi}" target="_blank">{title}</a>')
    } else if (!is.null(d$url) && nchar(d$url) > 0) {
        title_html <- glue('<a href="{d$url}" target="_blank">{title}</a>')
    } else {
        title_html <- title
    }

    # Build source line
    source_parts <- c()
    if (nchar(journal) > 0) source_parts <- c(source_parts, glue("*{journal}*"))
    if (!is.null(vol) && nchar(vol) > 0) {
        vol_str <- glue("**{vol}**")
        if (!is.null(issue) && nchar(issue) > 0) vol_str <- glue("{vol_str}({issue})")
        source_parts <- c(source_parts, vol_str)
    }
    if (!is.null(pages) && nchar(pages) > 0) source_parts <- c(source_parts, pages)
    if (!is.null(publisher) && nchar(publisher) > 0 && nchar(journal) == 0) {
        source_parts <- c(source_parts, publisher)
    }
    source_line <- paste(source_parts, collapse = ", ")

    glue('
<div class="pub-entry">
<p class="pub-title">{title_html}</p>
<p class="pub-authors">{authors} ({year})</p>
<p class="pub-source">{source_line}</p>
</div>
')
}

# Group by year
years <- vapply(pubs, function(x) {
    d <- x$data$date
    if (!is.null(d) && nchar(d) >= 4) substr(d, 1, 4) else "Other"
}, character(1))

unique_years <- unique(years)

html_output <- ""
for (yr in unique_years) {
    html_output <- paste0(html_output, glue("\n## {yr}\n\n"))
    yr_pubs <- pubs[years == yr]
    for (i in seq_along(yr_pubs)) {
        html_output <- paste0(
            html_output,
            glue('<div class="pub-numbered"><span class="pub-number">{i}.</span>'),
            format_pub(yr_pubs[[i]]),
            "</div>\n"
        )
    }
}
```

```{css}
#| echo: false

.pub-numbered {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.pub-number {
  color: #aaa;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  min-width: 1.5rem;
  text-align: right;
  padding-top: 0.15rem;
}

.pub-entry {
  flex: 1;
  padding-left: 1rem;
  border-left: 3px solid #e9ecef;
}

.pub-entry:hover {
  border-left-color: #6c757d;
}

.pub-authors {
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
  color: #777;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
}

.pub-title {
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.pub-title a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #2c3e50;
}

.pub-title a:hover {
  color: #ff0000;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.pub-source {
  color: #777;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

cat(html_output)
```

::: {.text-muted .mt-4 style="font-size: 0.85rem;"}
Data pulled from [Zotero](https://www.zotero.org/groups/6458407/francisco-cardozo/library). Last updated at render time.
:::
